exceptions.reason: The wrapping <div> carries no role="tablist" -- it is a plain div with only layout styling.
Each tab is a plain <button> with no role="tab".
Tabs.jsx renders no tabpanel at all -- panel content is left entirely to the consumer, with no id/aria-controls wiring offered to connect one.
No tab carries aria-controls; there is no panel id for it to reference even if one were added.
The active tab is communicated only visually -- bold weight and a crimson underline via inset box-shadow -- with no aria-selected attribute anywhere.
Not implemented. Every tab button keeps its own place in the normal Tab sequence; there is no single roving tab stop for the group.
Not implemented -- the component has no onKeyDown handler at all, only onClick.
